data.hyperedge_name: <hyperedge>"You may change allocations on any policy anniversary at no charge. First 4 reallocations per year are free; $25 fee thereafter."
<hyperedge>"Policy Number: HWP-IUL-2024-7290 Date of Issue: October 3, 2024 Form: Equity-Indexed Universal Life"
<hyperedge>"you also don't participate in dividends."
<hyperedge>"October 3, 2024"
<hyperedge>"You may pay premiums at any time in any amount between: Minimum: $100 per payment | Maximum: $50,000 per year (tax qualification limit)"
<hyperedge>"1.3 'Cap Rate' - The maximum interest rate that can be credited to an index account in any crediting period."
<hyperedge>"Total charges are deducted from account value on the 3rd of each month."

<hyperedge>"Available as optional rider: Guarantees coverage will not lapse even if account value drops to zero, as long as minimum guaranteed premiums are paid. Not currently elected on this policy."
<hyperedge>"Outstanding loans reduce death benefit at time of claim."
<hyperedge>"12.2 Dividends from index components are NOT included in index performance calculations."

<hyperedge>"While current caps and participation rates are shown above, we guarantee: Caps will never be less than 4%; Participation rates will never be less than 25%; Fixed account will never be less than 2%."
<hyperedge>"Phone: 1-888-HORIZON-1"
<hyperedge>"Owner: Jessica Lynn Thompson Insured: Jessica Lynn Thompson DOB: January 25, 1980 | Age: 44 | Gender: Female Underwriting Class: Standard Plus Non-Tobacco"
<hyperedge>"[SEAL]"
<hyperedge>"$6,000 annually is recommended to maintain coverage to age 100 based on current assumptions."
<hyperedge>"1.4 'Floor Rate' - The minimum interest rate (0%) that will be credited, protecting against market losses."
<hyperedge>"COI rates are guaranteed not to exceed rates shown in the policy schedule."
<hyperedge>"10.1 If account value is insufficient to pay monthly deductions, we will notify you at least 30 days before lapse."

<hyperedge>"If you surrender within first 12 years: Year 1: 10% | Year 4: 7% | Year 7: 4% | Year 10: 1% | Year 2: 9% | Year 5: 6% | Year 8: 3% | Year 11: 0.5% | Year 3: 8% | Year 6: 5% | Year 9: 2% | Year 12+: 0%"
<hyperedge>"Questions? Contact us: Horizon Wealth Protection Insurance"
<hyperedge>"12.3 Cap rates, participation rates, and fixed account rates may change annually but will never go below guaranteed minimums."
<hyperedge>"On each policy anniversary, we calculate: Index % Change = (Ending Index Value - Starting Index Value) ÷ Starting Index Value"
<hyperedge>"Initial Face Amount: $500,000 Death Benefit Option: Option 1 (Level) Planned Annual Premium: $6,000 Minimum Premium to Keep Policy in Force: Varies by year"
<hyperedge>"to age 100 based on current assumptions."
<hyperedge>"3.5% of each premium payment is deducted for"
<hyperedge>"1.5 'Participation Rate' - The percentage of index gain that is credited to your account."
<hyperedge>"Death Benefit = $500,000 (specified amount) – Lower ongoing charges."
<hyperedge>"10.2 Grace period: 61 days to pay sufficient premium to bring policy back in force."
<hyperedge>"NASDAQ-100 Index Account (Annual Point-to-Point): Current Cap: 9.0% | Participation Rate: 100% | Floor: 0% | Crediting Period: 1 year."
<hyperedge>"12.4 Past index performance does not guarantee future results."
<hyperedge>"Interest Credited = Index % Change × Participation Rate (subject to Cap and Floor)"
<hyperedge>"Primary: Matthew Scott Thompson (Spouse) - 100% Contingent: Thompson Family Trust - 100%"
<hyperedge>"You may skip premium payments as long as account value is sufficient to cover monthly deductions."
<hyperedge>"6% | Year 8: 3% | Year 11: 0.5% | Year 3: 8% | Year 6: 5% | Year 9: 2% | Year 12+: 0%"
<hyperedge>"1.6 'Point-to-Point Method' - Interest crediting based on index change from beginning to end of crediting period (annual)."
<hyperedge>"Death Benefit = Specified Amount + Account Value – Higher ongoing charges, benefit grows with account."
<hyperedge>"10.3 If premium not received within grace period, policy lapses and any remaining surrender value is paid to you."
<hyperedge>"Global Diversified Index Account: Current Cap: 8.5% | Participation Rate: 100% | Floor: 0% | Crediting Period: 1 year."
<hyperedge>"12.5 Zero is your hero - you cannot lose money due to negative index performance, but you also don't participate in dividends."
<hyperedge>"Assume S&P 500 Index: Started at 4,000 | Ended at 4,600 | Gain: 15% | With 100% participation and 10.5% cap | Interest credited: 10.5% (capped)"
<hyperedge>"Web: www.horizonwealthprotection.com"
<hyperedge>"1.1 'Index Account' - An account where interest credits are based on the performance of a stock market index."
<hyperedge>"3.5% of each premium payment is deducted for expenses."
<hyperedge>"8.2 Surrender charge is calculated as a percentage of premiums paid in the first 10 years."
<hyperedge>"2.1 AVAILABLE INDEX ACCOUNTS: A) S&P 500 Index Account (Annual Point-to-Point) Current Cap: 10.5% | Participation Rate: 100% Floor: 0% | Crediting Period: 1 year"
<hyperedge>"You may change options on any anniversary with 60 days notice. Evidence of insurability required to increase coverage."
<hyperedge>"11.1 SUICIDE: If insured commits suicide within 2 years of issue or reinstatement, we pay only premiums paid minus any withdrawals and charges, without interest."
<hyperedge>"Guaranteed interest rate: 3.0% annually | No cap, no floor variability."
<hyperedge>"Questions? Contact us: Horizon Wealth Protection Insurance Phone: 1-888-HORIZON-1 Web: www.horizonwealthpro"
<hyperedge>"If index declined 5%: Floor protects at 0% | Interest credited: 0% (no loss)"
<hyperedge>"Chief Executive Officer, Horizon Wealth Protection Insurance"
<hyperedge>"1.2 'Fixed Account' - An account earning a guaranteed fixed interest rate."
<hyperedge>"Deducted monthly based on: (Death Benefit - Account Value) × Monthly COI Rate ÷ 1,000."
<hyperedge>"8.3 Cash Surrender Value = Account Value - Surrender Charge - Outstanding Loans"
<hyperedge>"B) NASDAQ-100 Index Account (Annual Point-to-Point) Current Cap: 9.0% | Participation Rate: 100% Floor: 0% | Crediting Period: 1 year"
<hyperedge>"Available after 1 year – Maximum: 90% of surrender value – Loan interest: 4% annually (fixed loan rate) – Loaned amounts earn fixed account rate (3%) – Net cost: 1% annually."
<hyperedge>"11.2 CONTESTABILITY: We may contest this policy for material misrepresentation for 2 years from issue date."
<hyperedge>"S&P 500 Index: 50% | NASDAQ-100 Index: 30% | Fixed Account: 20%."
<hyperedge>"Executed at Chicago, Illinois"
<hyperedge>"INDEXED UNIVERSAL LIFE INSURANCE POLICY Horizon Wealth Protection Insurance"
<hyperedge>"You never lose money due to market decline. The worst case is 0% interest for that year."
<hyperedge>"$12 per month"
<hyperedge>"8.4 FREE PARTIAL WITHDRAWAL: You may withdraw up to 10% of account value each year without surrender charge after Year 1."
<hyperedge>"C"
<hyperedge>"Minimum: $500 – Maximum: Account value minus surrender charge – First 10 withdrawals free; $50 fee thereafter – Reduces death benefit dollar-for-dollar under Option 1."
<hyperedge>"12.1 This is NOT a securities product. Index participation does not involve direct ownership of stocks or index funds."
